message:
feat(dcg): complete pending exceptions with cleanup job and WebSocket events

Complete the DCG pending exceptions feature with background cleanup,
WebSocket notifications, and type safety fixes.

## New Cleanup Job (dcg-pending.service.ts)
- startDCGCleanupJob(): Periodic cleanup of expired exceptions
- stopDCGCleanupJob(): For test teardown
- Runs every 60 seconds to prune expired entries
- Integrated into server startup

## WebSocket Events (messages.ts)
Add message types for real-time pending exception updates:
- dcg.pending_created
- dcg.pending_approved
- dcg.pending_denied
- dcg.pending_expired
- dcg.pending_executed

## Type Safety Fixes
- paginate.ts: Add non-null assertions for array access
- dcg-pending.service.ts: Build result object conditionally for
  exactOptionalPropertyTypes compliance

## Server Integration (index.ts)
- Import and start DCG cleanup job on server boot
- Runs alongside existing reservation cleanup job

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
